model.dwh_project.dim_date.raw_code:
{{ config(
    materialized='table',
    indexes=[
      {'columns': ['date_actual'], 'unique': True}
    ]
) }}

with date_series as (
    -- Sử dụng hàm đặc trưng của Postgres để gen chuỗi ngày
    select 
        generate_series(
            '2020-01-01'::date, 
            current_date, 
            '1 day'::interval
        )::date as date_actual
),

final as (
    select
        date_actual,
        extract(year from date_actual)::int as year_actual,
        extract(month from date_actual)::int as month_actual,
        extract(day from date_actual)::int as day_of_month,
        extract(quarter from date_actual)::int as quarter_actual,
        extract(isodow from date_actual)::int as day_of_week,
        
        -- Tên tháng và thứ
        trim(to_char(date_actual, 'Month')) as month_name,
        trim(to_char(date_actual, 'Day')) as day_name,
        
        -- Các cờ logic (Booleans)
        case when extract(isodow from date_actual) in (6, 7) then true else false end as is_weekend,
        
        -- Xác định ngày cuối tháng (Last day of month)
        (date_trunc('month', date_actual) + interval '1 month - 1 day')::date as last_day_of_month,
        
        -- Kiểm tra xem có phải ngày cuối tháng không
        case 
            when date_actual = (date_trunc('month', date_actual) + interval '1 month - 1 day')::date then true 
            else false 
        end as is_last_day_of_month
    from date_series
)

select * from final
order by date_actual
model.dwh_project.dim_date.compiled_code:
with date_series as (
    -- Sử dụng hàm đặc trưng của Postgres để gen chuỗi ngày
    select 
        generate_series(
            '2020-01-01'::date, 
            current_date, 
            '1 day'::interval
        )::date as date_actual
),

final as (
    select
        date_actual,
        extract(year from date_actual)::int as year_actual,
        extract(month from date_actual)::int as month_actual,
        extract(day from date_actual)::int as day_of_month,
        extract(quarter from date_actual)::int as quarter_actual,
        extract(isodow from date_actual)::int as day_of_week,
        
        -- Tên tháng và thứ
        trim(to_char(date_actual, 'Month')) as month_name,
        trim(to_char(date_actual, 'Day')) as day_name,
        
        -- Các cờ logic (Booleans)
        case when extract(isodow from date_actual) in (6, 7) then true else false end as is_weekend,
        
        -- Xác định ngày cuối tháng (Last day of month)
        (date_trunc('month', date_actual) + interval '1 month - 1 day')::date as last_day_of_month,
        
        -- Kiểm tra xem có phải ngày cuối tháng không
        case 
            when date_actual = (date_trunc('month', date_actual) + interval '1 month - 1 day')::date then true 
            else false 
        end as is_last_day_of_month
    from date_series
)

select * from final
order by date_actual

model.dwh_project.dim_members.name: dim_members
model.dwh_project.dim_members.raw_code:
{{ config(materialized='table') }}



WITH priority_status AS (
    SELECT 
        u.*,
        CASE 
            WHEN u.user_status IS NOT NULL AND u.user_status != '' 
            AND u.user_status NOT ILIKE '%Inac%' 
            THEN 1
            ELSE 0  -- Inactive/Null/Empty Status
        END AS sort_priority -- Cột ưu tiên

    FROM {{ ref('users') }} u
),

get_end_date AS (
    SELECT 
        a.*,
        -- SẮP XẾP: Các bản ghi sort_priority=0 (Inactive) được xếp trước theo thời gian, 
        -- Bản ghi sort_priority=1 (Active) được đẩy xuống cuối.
        -- trừ 1 tháng cho case email có 2 dòng, vì email cũ có thể hết trong các tháng trước rất lâu 
        CASE 
            WHEN LEAD(create_time, 1, TIMESTAMP '2999-12-31') OVER (
                PARTITION BY company_email
                ORDER BY sort_priority ASC, create_time ASC 
            ) = TIMESTAMP '2999-12-31' 
            THEN DATE '2999-12-31'
            ELSE (DATE_TRUNC('month', 
                LEAD(create_time, 1, TIMESTAMP '2999-12-31') OVER (
                    PARTITION BY company_email
                    ORDER BY sort_priority ASC, create_time ASC 
                )
            ) - INTERVAL '1 day')::DATE
        END AS end_date_1

    FROM priority_status a

),
--  dùng cho case 1 email có 2 người dùng
cleaned_data AS (
    SELECT
        *
    FROM get_end_date
    WHERE 
        date(create_time) < end_date_1
        OR end_date_1 = DATE('2999-12-31')
),

-- user sẽ có ngày tạo và kết thúc , nhưng trạng thái inactive vẫn cần chỉnh lại để biết nghỉ thời gian nào
-- sẽ chuyển create_time về đầu tháng vì case trên đã tạo cuối tháng , k sợ trùng
cleaned_users as (
    select * ,
    date(DATE_TRUNC('month', create_time)) as create_date_used
    from cleaned_data
),

user_log AS (
    SELECT 
        u.lower_user_name as email,
        max(DATE_TRUNC('month',w.start_time)::DATE) as date
    FROM {{ ref('jira_worklog') }} w
    LEFT JOIN {{ ref('jira_app_user') }} u
    on w.worklog_author = u.user_key
    LEFT JOIN {{ ref('users') }} du
    on u.lower_user_name = du.company_email
    where (du.user_status IN ('Inactivity', 'null') or du.user_status is null)
    group by u.lower_user_name
),
user_jira_issues AS (
    SELECT 
        i.assignee_email as email,
        max(DATE_TRUNC('month',i.created_time)::DATE) as date
    FROM {{ ref('fct_jira_issues') }} i
    LEFT JOIN {{ ref('users') }} du
    on i.assignee_email = du.company_email
    where (du.user_status IN ('Inactivity', 'null') or du.user_status is null)
    group by i.assignee_email

),
user_pod AS (
    SELECT 
        u.company_email as email,
        max((p.month_year || '-01')::DATE) AS date
    FROM {{ ref('billable_efforts_approveds') }} p
    LEFT JOIN {{ ref('users') }} u
    on p.user_id = u.user_id
    where (u.user_status IN ('Inactivity', 'null') or u.user_status IS NULL)
    and effort::NUMERIC != 0
    and p."is_deleted" = 'No'
    group by u.company_email
),
all_data_log as (
    select * from user_log
    union
    select * from user_pod
    union
    select * from user_jira_issues
),
-- lấy ngày cuối cùng user có ghi nhận trong hệ thống , chỉ lấy user inactive, null
max_date_user as (
    select 
        email,
        max(date) as max_date
    from all_data_log
    group by email
),

change_end_date_inactive_user as (
    select 
        cu.*,
        case 
            when (mu.max_date is NULL)
                AND date(cu.end_date_1) = '2999-12-31' and (cu.user_status IN ('Inactivity', 'null') or cu.user_status IS NULL)
                then (date_trunc('month', cu.create_time) + interval '1 month - 1 day')::DATE
            when (mu.max_date is NOT NULL)
                AND date(cu.end_date_1) = '2999-12-31' and (cu.user_status IN ('Inactivity', 'null') or cu.user_status IS NULL)
                then (date_trunc('month', mu.max_date) + interval '1 month - 1 day')::DATE

        end as end_date_2
    from cleaned_users cu
    left join max_date_user mu
    on cu.company_email = mu.email
),
_final as (
    select 
        *,

        COALESCE(end_date_2, end_date_1) as end_date
    from change_end_date_inactive_user
)

SELECT
    a.user_id as member_id,
    a.user_name as member_name,
    a.company_email as member_email,
    a.staff_code,
    b.branch_name,
    b.branch_code,
    c.department_name,
    d.position_name,
    a.user_level,
    a.user_status,
    date(a.create_time) as create_date,
    a.create_date_used,
    a.end_date,
    COUNT(*) OVER (
        PARTITION BY a.company_email
    ) AS count_email_duplicates,
    a.etl_datetime
FROM _final a
LEFT JOIN {{ ref('branches') }} b
ON a.branch_id = b.branch_id
LEFT JOIN {{ ref('departments') }} c
ON a.department_id = c.department_id
LEFT JOIN {{ ref('user_positions') }} d
ON a.position_id = d.position_id
WHERE a.company_email is not NULL AND a.company_email != 'null' AND a.company_email NOT LIKE 'Inactive%'
-- and a.staff_code is not NULL 
-- and a.user_status not IN ('Inactivity', 'null')

GROUP BY
    member_id,
    member_name,
    member_email,
    staff_code,
    b.branch_name,
    b.branch_code,
    c.department_name,
    d.position_name,
    a.user_level,
    a.user_status,
    date(a.create_time),
    a.create_date_used,
    a.end_date,
    a.etl_datetime

model.dwh_project.dim_attendance_types.description:
[EN] Dimension table containing attendance types and their attributes.  Each row represents one attendance type used to classify employee attendance records.
[VI] Bảng danh mục loại chấm công.  Mỗi dòng là 1 loại chấm công dùng để phân loại dữ liệu nghỉ phép / đi làm.

attendance_type_id.name: attendance_type_id
attendance_type_id.description: [EN] Unique identifier of attendance type. [VI] Mã định danh loại chấm công.

attendance_type_name.name: attendance_type_name
attendance_type_name.description: [EN] Name of attendance type (e.g. leave, sick leave). [VI] Tên loại chấm công (ví dụ: nghỉ phép, nghỉ ốm).

attendance_type_code.name: attendance_type_code
attendance_type_code.description: [EN] Code of attendance type. [VI] Mã loại chấm công.

attendance_work_day.name: attendance_work_day
attendance_work_day.description: [EN] Workday value associated with attendance type. [VI] Giá trị công tương ứng với loại chấm công.

status.name: status
status.description: [EN] Status of attendance type. [VI] Trạng thái của loại chấm công.

is_deleted.name: is_deleted
is_deleted.description: [EN] Whether this type is deleted. [VI] Đánh dấu đã bị xóa hay chưa.

type.name: type
type.description: [EN] Category/type of attendance (e.g. leave, working). [VI] Nhóm loại chấm công.

unit_status.name: unit_status
unit_status.description: [EN] Status of unit configuration. [VI] Trạng thái đơn vị tính.

unit_type.name: unit_type
unit_type.description: [EN] Type of unit (e.g. day, hour). [VI] Loại đơn vị (ngày, giờ).

unit_value.name: unit_value
unit_value.description: [EN] Value of unit. [VI] Giá trị đơn vị.

updated_time.name: updated_time
updated_time.description: [EN] Last updated timestamp. [VI] Thời điểm cập nhật.

etl_datetime.name: etl_datetime
etl_datetime.description: [EN] ETL processing timestamp. For pipeline monitoring only. [VI] Thời điểm xử lý ETL. Chỉ dùng cho monitoring pipeline.

active_contract.condition_sql: date_start <= CURRENT_DATE  AND (date_end IS NULL OR date_end > CURRENT_DATE)

contract_at_time.condition_sql: date_start <= :target_date  AND (date_end IS NULL OR date_end > :target_date)

avoid_for: determining currently active employees (use dim_employee for primary status)

Always apply date filters when analyzing contract counts to avoid overcounting historical records.
Resign date may differ from contract end date depending on HR policy.

model.dwh_project.dim_contracts.description:
[EN] Employee contract dimension table.  Contains contract information including type, duration, and employment status.
[VI] Bảng hợp đồng nhân viên.  Lưu thông tin hợp đồng bao gồm loại hợp đồng, thời gian và trạng thái.

contract_id.name: contract_id
contract_id.description: [EN] Unique identifier of contract. [VI] Mã hợp đồng.

member_id.name: member_id
member_id.description: [EN] Employee identifier. Foreign key to dim_employee. [VI] Mã nhân viên. Khóa ngoại tới dim_employee.

contract_type_id.name: contract_type_id
contract_type_id.description: [EN] Contract type identifier. [VI] Mã loại hợp đồng.

contract_type.name: contract_type
contract_type.description: [EN] Contract type name (e.g. Probation, Full-time, Internship). [VI] Tên loại hợp đồng.

member_code.name: member_code
member_code.description: [EN] Display employee code. [VI] Mã nhân viên hiển thị.

name.name: name
name.description: [EN] Contract name or title. [VI] Tên hợp đồng.

state.name: state
state.description: [EN] Contract state (e.g. Draft, Open, Close). [VI] Trạng thái hợp đồng.

date_start.name: date_start
date_start.description: [EN] Contract effective start date. [VI] Ngày bắt đầu hợp đồng.

date_end.name: date_end
date_end.description: [EN] Contract end date. Null if indefinite. [VI] Ngày kết thúc hợp đồng. Để trống nếu là hợp đồng không thời hạn.

resign_date.name: resign_date
resign_date.description: [EN] Resignation date or actual last day of work. [VI] Ngày nghỉ việc thực tế.

etl_datetime.name: etl_datetime
etl_datetime.description: [EN] ETL processing timestamp. For pipeline monitoring only. [VI] Thời điểm xử lý ETL. Chỉ dùng cho monitoring pipeline.

model.dwh_project.dim_members_new.name: dim_members_new
model.dwh_project.dim_members_new.raw_code:
{{ config(materialized='table') }}

WITH user_base AS (
    SELECT
        u.user_id,
        u.user_name,
        u.company_email,
        u.staff_code,
        u.branch_id,
        u.department_id,
        u.position_id,
        u.user_level,
        u.user_status,
        u.create_time,
        u.welcome_day,
        u.etl_datetime,
        -- Resolve official_date ngay tại đây
        COALESCE(
            ui.official_date_use,
            ui.probation_date_use,
            ui.intern_date_use,
            ui.created_at
        )                          AS official_date,
        ui.official_date_use,
        case
            when ui.official_date_use is not null then 'official'
            when ui.probation_date_use is not null then 'probation'
            else 'intern'
        end as user_status_source,
        ui.probation_date_use,
        ui.intern_date_use,
        ui.birth_day,
        ui.created_at,
        ui.quit_date_use,
        ui.end_date                AS period_end_date
    FROM {{ ref('users') }} u
    JOIN {{ ref('users_infos_tranforms') }} ui
        ON u.user_id = ui.user_id
    WHERE u.company_email IS NOT NULL
      AND u.company_email != 'null'
),

-- ============================================================
-- LAYER 2: Odoo job/role (fix: dùng DISTINCT thay vì GROUP BY)
-- ============================================================
odoo_job AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        e.member_code,
        e.contract_type,
        COALESCE(
            {{ parse_python_json('job_info.name_json') }}->>'vi_VN',
            {{ parse_python_json('job_info.name_json') }}->>'en_US',
            'unknown'
        ) AS job_name,
        COALESCE(
            {{ parse_python_json('role_info.name_json') }}->>'vi_VN',
            {{ parse_python_json('role_info.name_json') }}->>'en_US',
            'unknown'
        ) AS role_name
    FROM {{ ref('dim_odoo_members') }} e
    left JOIN {{ ref('odoo_hr_job') }} job_info
        ON e.job_id = job_info.job_id
    left JOIN {{ ref('odoo_hr_job') }} role_info
        ON job_info.group_role_id = role_info.job_id
),

-- ============================================================
-- LAYER 3: Last active date cho inactive users
-- ============================================================
last_active_date AS (
    -- Worklog
    SELECT u.lower_user_name AS email,
           MAX(DATE_TRUNC('month', w.start_time)::DATE) AS last_date
    FROM {{ ref('jira_worklog') }} w
    JOIN {{ ref('jira_app_user') }} u ON w.worklog_author = u.user_key
    JOIN {{ ref('users') }} du        ON u.lower_user_name = du.company_email
    WHERE du.user_status IN ('Inactivity', 'null') OR du.user_status IS NULL
    GROUP BY u.lower_user_name

    UNION ALL

    -- Jira issues
    SELECT i.assignee_email AS email,
           MAX(DATE_TRUNC('month', i.created_time)::DATE) AS last_date
    FROM {{ ref('fct_jira_issues') }} i
    JOIN {{ ref('users') }} du ON i.assignee_email = du.company_email
    WHERE du.user_status IN ('Inactivity', 'null') OR du.user_status IS NULL
    GROUP BY i.assignee_email

    UNION ALL

    -- POD efforts
    SELECT u.company_email AS email,
           MAX((p.month_year || '-01')::DATE) AS last_date
    FROM {{ ref('billable_efforts_approveds') }} p
    JOIN {{ ref('users') }} u ON p.user_id = u.user_id
    WHERE (u.user_status IN ('Inactivity', 'null') OR u.user_status IS NULL)
      AND p.effort::NUMERIC != 0
      AND p.is_deleted = 'No'
    GROUP BY u.company_email
),

max_last_active AS (
    SELECT email, MAX(last_date) AS max_date
    FROM last_active_date
    GROUP BY email
),

-- ============================================================
-- LAYER 4: Resolve end_date logic
-- ============================================================
date_resolution AS (
    SELECT
        u.*,
        IS_INACTIVE.flag                                AS is_inactive,
        -- quit_date: ưu tiên quit_date_use, fallback về ngày sớm nhất có data
        CASE
            WHEN IS_INACTIVE.flag
             AND u.official_date IS NULL
             AND u.quit_date_use IS NULL
            THEN COALESCE(u.probation_date_use, u.intern_date_use, u.created_at)
            ELSE u.quit_date_use
        END                                             AS quit_date_resolved,
        -- end_date từ last active (nếu chưa có period_end_date)
        CASE
            WHEN IS_INACTIVE.flag AND u.period_end_date IS NULL
            THEN (
                DATE_TRUNC('month', COALESCE(mla.max_date, u.official_date))
                + INTERVAL '1 month - 1 day'
            )::DATE
        END                                             AS end_date_from_activity
    FROM user_base u
    CROSS JOIN LATERAL (
        SELECT (u.user_status IN ('Inactivity', 'null') OR u.user_status IS NULL) AS flag
    ) IS_INACTIVE
    LEFT JOIN max_last_active mla ON u.company_email = mla.email
),

final_dates AS (
    SELECT
        *,
        -- end_date cuối cùng
        CASE
            WHEN is_inactive THEN
                GREATEST(
                    COALESCE(quit_date_resolved, end_date_from_activity, official_date),
                    official_date  -- đảm bảo end_date không nhỏ hơn official_date
                )
        END                                             AS end_date,
        -- create_date_used
        CASE
            WHEN create_time < official_date
            THEN DATE_TRUNC('month', create_time)::DATE
            ELSE DATE_TRUNC('month', official_date)::DATE
        END                                             AS create_date_used
    FROM date_resolution
),

-- ============================================================
-- LAYER 5: Assemble dim
-- ============================================================
dim_assembled AS (
    SELECT
        -- Keys
        fd.user_id                                          AS member_id,
        fd.staff_code,
        fd.company_email                                    AS member_email,

        -- Descriptors
        fd.user_name                                        AS member_name,
        COALESCE(NULLIF(b.branch_name,   'NO'), 'Unknown') AS branch_name,
        COALESCE(NULLIF(b.branch_code,   'NO'), 'Unknown') AS branch_code,
        COALESCE(NULLIF(dep.department_name,'NO'),'Unknown')AS division_name,
        COALESCE(NULLIF(pos.position_name,'NO'), 'Unknown') AS position_name,
        COALESCE(NULLIF(fd.user_level,   'NO'), 'FRESHER') AS user_level,
        COALESCE(NULLIF(fd.user_status,  'NO'), 'Unknown') AS user_status,
        COALESCE(NULLIF(oj.job_name,     'NO'), 'Unknown') AS job_name,
        COALESCE(NULLIF(oj.role_name,    'NO'), 'Unknown') AS role_name,
        INITCAP(
            LOWER(
                CASE 
                    WHEN fd.user_status = 'Inactivity'
                    THEN COALESCE(oj.contract_type, fd.user_status_source, 'Unknown')
                    ELSE fd.user_status
                END
            )
        ) AS user_status_originals_d,
        case 
            when fd.user_status = 'Inactivity'
            then 'Inactivity'
            else 'Active'
        end as user_status_originals,


        -- Dates
        DATE(fd.create_time)                                AS create_date,
        fd.official_date::DATE                              AS official_date,
        fd.probation_date_use::DATE                         AS probation_date,
        fd.intern_date_use::DATE                            AS intern_date,
        fd.welcome_day::DATE                                AS welcome_day,
        fd.birth_day,
        fd.end_date,
        fd.create_date_used,

        -- Metrics
        COALESCE(
            EXTRACT(YEAR FROM fd.official_date)
            - EXTRACT(YEAR FROM fd.birth_day),
            0
        )::INT                                              AS age_at_hire,

        -- DQ
        COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY fd.company_email)       AS count_email_duplicates,

        fd.etl_datetime
    FROM final_dates fd
    LEFT JOIN {{ ref('branches') }}       b   ON fd.branch_id     = b.branch_id
    LEFT JOIN {{ ref('departments') }}    dep ON fd.department_id  = dep.department_id
    LEFT JOIN {{ ref('user_positions') }} pos ON fd.position_id    = pos.position_id
    LEFT JOIN odoo_job                    oj  ON fd.staff_code     = oj.member_code
)

-- ============================================================
-- LAYER 6: Business classifications (tách khỏi join để dễ maintain)
-- ============================================================
SELECT
    member_id,
    member_name,
    member_email,
    staff_code,
    branch_name,
    branch_code,
    division_name,
    user_status_originals,
    case 
        when user_status_originals_d = 'Probation' then 'Probationary'
        else user_status_originals_d
    end as user_status_originals_detail,

    -- Division group: tách DU suffix
    CASE
        WHEN division_name ILIKE '%DU%'
        THEN TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(division_name, '\.?DU.*', ''))
        ELSE division_name
    END                                                     AS division_group,

    position_name,
    user_level,
    user_status,

    -- Position group classification
    CASE
        WHEN position_name ILIKE ANY(ARRAY['%intern%','%thử việc%','%học việc%','%fresher%'])
            THEN 'INTERN_TRAINEE'
        WHEN position_name ILIKE ANY(ARRAY['%manager%','%director%','%head%','%leader%','%ceo%','%cto%'])
            THEN 'MANAGEMENT'
        WHEN position_name ILIKE ANY(ARRAY['%developer%','%engineer%','%data%','%ai%',
                                           '%machine learning%','%tester%','%qa%',
                                           '%devops%','%infra%','%cloud%'])
            THEN 'ENGINEERING'
        WHEN position_name ILIKE ANY(ARRAY['%ba%','%business analyst%','%product%'])
            THEN 'PRODUCT_BA'
        WHEN position_name ILIKE ANY(ARRAY['%sale%','%account%','%business development%','%pre-sales%'])
            THEN 'SALES'
        WHEN position_name ILIKE ANY(ARRAY['%marketing%','%mkt%','%content%','%seo%'])
            THEN 'MARKETING'
        WHEN position_name ILIKE ANY(ARRAY['%hr%','%admin%','%accountant%','%ta%','%ga%'])
            THEN 'HR_ADMIN'
        WHEN position_name ILIKE ANY(ARRAY['%project%','%delivery%','%operation%','%support%'])
            THEN 'OPERATION'
        ELSE 'OTHER'
    END                                                     AS position_group,

    job_name,
    role_name,
    create_date,
    official_date,
    probation_date,
    intern_date,
    welcome_day,
    birth_day,
    age_at_hire,
    create_date_used,
    end_date,
    count_email_duplicates,
    etl_datetime

FROM dim_assembled
model.dwh_project.dim_members_new.compiled_code:
WITH user_base AS (
    SELECT
        u.user_id,
        u.user_name,
        u.company_email,
        u.staff_code,
        u.branch_id,
        u.department_id,
        u.position_id,
        u.user_level,
        u.user_status,
        u.create_time,
        u.welcome_day,
        u.etl_datetime,
        -- Resolve official_date ngay tại đây
        COALESCE(
            ui.official_date_use,
            ui.probation_date_use,
            ui.intern_date_use,
            ui.created_at
        )                          AS official_date,
        ui.official_date_use,
        case
            when ui.official_date_use is not null then 'official'
            when ui.probation_date_use is not null then 'probation'
            else 'intern'
        end as user_status_source,
        ui.probation_date_use,
        ui.intern_date_use,
        ui.birth_day,
        ui.created_at,
        ui.quit_date_use,
        ui.end_date                AS period_end_date
    FROM "dwh"."intermediates"."users" u
    JOIN "dwh"."intermediates"."users_infos_tranforms" ui
        ON u.user_id = ui.user_id
    WHERE u.company_email IS NOT NULL
      AND u.company_email != 'null'
),

-- ============================================================
-- LAYER 2: Odoo job/role (fix: dùng DISTINCT thay vì GROUP BY)
-- ============================================================
odoo_job AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        e.member_code,
        e.contract_type,
        COALESCE(
            
(
    REGEXP_REPLACE(
        REGEXP_REPLACE(
            REGEXP_REPLACE(
                REGEXP_REPLACE(job_info.name_json, '''([^'']*?)''', '"\1"', 'g'),
                '\bTrue\b',  'true',  'g'
            ),
            '\bFalse\b', 'false', 'g'
        ),
        '\bNone\b', 'null', 'g'
    )::JSONB
)
->>'vi_VN',
            
(
    REGEXP_REPLACE(
        REGEXP_REPLACE(
            REGEXP_REPLACE(
                REGEXP_REPLACE(job_info.name_json, '''([^'']*?)''', '"\1"', 'g'),
                '\bTrue\b',  'true',  'g'
            ),
            '\bFalse\b', 'false', 'g'
        ),
        '\bNone\b', 'null', 'g'
    )::JSONB
)
->>'en_US',
            'unknown'
        ) AS job_name,
        COALESCE(
            
(
    REGEXP_REPLACE(
        REGEXP_REPLACE(
            REGEXP_REPLACE(
                REGEXP_REPLACE(role_info.name_json, '''([^'']*?)''', '"\1"', 'g'),
                '\bTrue\b',  'true',  'g'
            ),
            '\bFalse\b', 'false', 'g'
        ),
        '\bNone\b', 'null', 'g'
    )::JSONB
)
->>'vi_VN',
            
(
    REGEXP_REPLACE(
        REGEXP_REPLACE(
            REGEXP_REPLACE(
                REGEXP_REPLACE(role_info.name_json, '''([^'']*?)''', '"\1"', 'g'),
                '\bTrue\b',  'true',  'g'
            ),
            '\bFalse\b', 'false', 'g'
        ),
        '\bNone\b', 'null', 'g'
    )::JSONB
)
->>'en_US',
            'unknown'
        ) AS role_name
    FROM "dwh"."dim"."dim_odoo_members" e
    left JOIN "dwh"."intermediates"."odoo_hr_job" job_info
        ON e.job_id = job_info.job_id
    left JOIN "dwh"."intermediates"."odoo_hr_job" role_info
        ON job_info.group_role_id = role_info.job_id
),

-- ============================================================
-- LAYER 3: Last active date cho inactive users
-- ============================================================
last_active_date AS (
    -- Worklog
    SELECT u.lower_user_name AS email,
           MAX(DATE_TRUNC('month', w.start_time)::DATE) AS last_date
    FROM "dwh"."intermediates"."jira_worklog" w
    JOIN "dwh"."intermediates"."jira_app_user" u ON w.worklog_author = u.user_key
    JOIN "dwh"."intermediates"."users" du        ON u.lower_user_name = du.company_email
    WHERE du.user_status IN ('Inactivity', 'null') OR du.user_status IS NULL
    GROUP BY u.lower_user_name

    UNION ALL

    -- Jira issues
    SELECT i.assignee_email AS email,
           MAX(DATE_TRUNC('month', i.created_time)::DATE) AS last_date
    FROM "dwh"."fct"."fct_jira_issues" i
    JOIN "dwh"."intermediates"."users" du ON i.assignee_email = du.company_email
    WHERE du.user_status IN ('Inactivity', 'null') OR du.user_status IS NULL
    GROUP BY i.assignee_email

    UNION ALL

    -- POD efforts
    SELECT u.company_email AS email,
           MAX((p.month_year || '-01')::DATE) AS last_date
    FROM "dwh"."intermediates"."billable_efforts_approveds" p
    JOIN "dwh"."intermediates"."users" u ON p.user_id = u.user_id
    WHERE (u.user_status IN ('Inactivity', 'null') OR u.user_status IS NULL)
      AND p.effort::NUMERIC != 0
      AND p.is_deleted = 'No'
    GROUP BY u.company_email
),

max_last_active AS (
    SELECT email, MAX(last_date) AS max_date
    FROM last_active_date
    GROUP BY email
),

-- ============================================================
-- LAYER 4: Resolve end_date logic
-- ============================================================
date_resolution AS (
    SELECT
        u.*,
        IS_INACTIVE.flag                                AS is_inactive,
        -- quit_date: ưu tiên quit_date_use, fallback về ngày sớm nhất có data
        CASE
            WHEN IS_INACTIVE.flag
             AND u.official_date IS NULL
             AND u.quit_date_use IS NULL
            THEN COALESCE(u.probation_date_use, u.intern_date_use, u.created_at)
            ELSE u.quit_date_use
        END                                             AS quit_date_resolved,
        -- end_date từ last active (nếu chưa có period_end_date)
        CASE
            WHEN IS_INACTIVE.flag AND u.period_end_date IS NULL
            THEN (
                DATE_TRUNC('month', COALESCE(mla.max_date, u.official_date))
                + INTERVAL '1 month - 1 day'
            )::DATE
        END                                             AS end_date_from_activity
    FROM user_base u
    CROSS JOIN LATERAL (
        SELECT (u.user_status IN ('Inactivity', 'null') OR u.user_status IS NULL) AS flag
    ) IS_INACTIVE
    LEFT JOIN max_last_active mla ON u.company_email = mla.email
),

final_dates AS (
    SELECT
        *,
        -- end_date cuối cùng
        CASE
            WHEN is_inactive THEN
                GREATEST(
                    COALESCE(quit_date_resolved, end_date_from_activity, official_date),
                    official_date  -- đảm bảo end_date không nhỏ hơn official_date
                )
        END                                             AS end_date,
        -- create_date_used
        CASE
            WHEN create_time < official_date
            THEN DATE_TRUNC('month', create_time)::DATE
            ELSE DATE_TRUNC('month', official_date)::DATE
        END                                             AS create_date_used
    FROM date_resolution
),

-- ============================================================
-- LAYER 5: Assemble dim
-- ============================================================
dim_assembled AS (
    SELECT
        -- Keys
        fd.user_id                                          AS member_id,
        fd.staff_code,
        fd.company_email                                    AS member_email,

        -- Descriptors
        fd.user_name                                        AS member_name,
        COALESCE(NULLIF(b.branch_name,   'NO'), 'Unknown') AS branch_name,
        COALESCE(NULLIF(b.branch_code,   'NO'), 'Unknown') AS branch_code,
        COALESCE(NULLIF(dep.department_name,'NO'),'Unknown')AS division_name,
        COALESCE(NULLIF(pos.position_name,'NO'), 'Unknown') AS position_name,
        COALESCE(NULLIF(fd.user_level,   'NO'), 'FRESHER') AS user_level,
        COALESCE(NULLIF(fd.user_status,  'NO'), 'Unknown') AS user_status,
        COALESCE(NULLIF(oj.job_name,     'NO'), 'Unknown') AS job_name,
        COALESCE(NULLIF(oj.role_name,    'NO'), 'Unknown') AS role_name,
        INITCAP(
            LOWER(
                CASE 
                    WHEN fd.user_status = 'Inactivity'
                    THEN COALESCE(oj.contract_type, fd.user_status_source, 'Unknown')
                    ELSE fd.user_status
                END
            )
        ) AS user_status_originals_d,
        case 
            when fd.user_status = 'Inactivity'
            then 'Inactivity'
            else 'Active'
        end as user_status_originals,


        -- Dates
        DATE(fd.create_time)                                AS create_date,

        fd.probation_date_use::DATE                         AS probation_date,
        fd.intern_date_use::DATE                            AS intern_date,
        fd.welcome_day::DATE                                AS welcome_day,

        )::INT                                              AS age_at_hire,

        -- DQ

        fd.etl_datetime
    FROM final_dates fd
    LEFT JOIN "dwh"."intermediates"."branches"       b   ON fd.branch_id     = b.branch_id
    LEFT JOIN "dwh"."intermediates"."departments"    dep ON fd.department_id  = dep.department_id
    LEFT JOIN "dwh"."intermediates"."user_positions" pos ON fd.position_id    = pos.position_id
    LEFT JOIN odoo_job                    oj  ON fd.staff_code     = oj.member_code
)

-- ============================================================
-- LAYER 6: Business classifications (tách khỏi join để dễ maintain)

SELECT

    job_name,

model.dwh_project.dim_projects.description:
[EN] Dimension table containing project (POD) information. Each row represents one project, including attributes such as type, size, ownership, and timeline milestones.
[VI] Bảng danh mục dự án (POD). Mỗi dòng là 1 dự án, bao gồm thông tin loại, quy mô, người phụ trách và các mốc thời gian.

pod_id.name: pod_id
pod_id.description: [EN] Unique identifier of project. [VI] Mã dự án.

project_type.name: project_type
project_type.description: [EN] Type of project. [VI] Loại dự án.

project_size.name: project_size
project_size.description: [EN] Size of project. [VI] Quy mô dự án.

project_rank.name: project_rank
project_rank.description: [EN] Priority or ranking of project. [VI] Mức độ ưu tiên dự án.

project_overview.name: project_overview
project_overview.description: [EN] Overview/description of project. [VI] Mô tả dự án.

project_category.name: project_category
project_category.description: [EN] Category of project. [VI] Nhóm dự án.

jira_url.name: jira_url
jira_url.description: [EN] Jira link of project. [VI] Link Jira.

code_jira.name: code_jira
code_jira.description: [EN] Extracted Jira project code. [VI] Mã project Jira.

department_id.name: department_id
department_id.description: [EN] Division responsible for project. Foreign key to dim_division. [VI] Phòng ban phụ trách. Khóa ngoại tới dim_division.

pm_id.name: pm_id
pm_id.description: [EN] Project manager. Foreign key to dim_employee. [VI] PM. Khóa ngoại tới dim_employee.

sale_id.name: sale_id
sale_id.description: [EN] Sales owner. Foreign key to dim_employee. [VI] Sales phụ trách. Khóa ngoại tới dim_employee.

sub_pm_id.name: sub_pm_id
sub_pm_id.description: [EN] Sub project manager. Foreign key to dim_employee. [VI] PM phụ. Khóa ngoại tới dim_employee.

start_date.name: start_date
start_date.description: [EN] Project start date. [VI] Ngày bắt đầu dự án.

plan_uat_date.name: plan_uat_date
plan_uat_date.description: [EN] Planned UAT date. [VI] Ngày UAT dự kiến.

plan_release_date.name: plan_release_date
plan_release_date.description: [EN] Planned release date. [VI] Ngày release dự kiến.

final_release_date.name: final_release_date
final_release_date.description: [EN] Actual release date. [VI] Ngày release thực tế.

pod_status.name: pod_status
pod_status.description: [EN] Project lifecycle status. [VI] Trạng thái dự án.

status.name: status
status.description: [EN] Raw status field from source system. [VI] Trạng thái gốc.

etl_datetime.name: etl_datetime
etl_datetime.description: [EN] ETL processing timestamp. For pipeline monitoring only. [VI] Thời điểm ETL. Chỉ dùng cho monitoring pipeline.

model.dwh_project.dim_skill_level.name: dim_skill_level

preferred_for: comparing skill proficiency across different skill types
avoid_for: interpreting level_name as a standardized field (use level_group instead)
warnings: level_group is derived using pattern matching logic from level_name
New level_name values in source may fall into 'Other' if pattern logic is not updated
Always prioritize level_group for aggregated reporting

model.dwh_project.dim_skill_level.description:
[EN] Dimension table containing skill levels and their normalized grouping. Includes logic to standardize different naming conventions into consistent level groups.
[VI] Bảng danh mục cấp độ kỹ năng. Bao gồm logic chuẩn hóa các tên level khác nhau thành nhóm level thống nhất.

skill_level_id.name: skill_level_id
skill_level_id.description: [EN] Unique identifier of skill level. [VI] Mã cấp độ kỹ năng.

skill_type_id.name: skill_type_id
skill_type_id.description: [EN] Identifier of skill type. Foreign key to dim_skill_type. [VI] Mã loại kỹ năng. Khóa ngoại tới dim_skill_type.

level_name.name: level_name
level_name.description: [EN] Original level name (raw) as it appears in the source system. [VI] Tên cấp độ gốc từ hệ thống nguồn.

level_group.name: level_group
level_group.description: [EN] Normalized level group (e.g., Beginner, Intermediate, Advanced, etc.). Use this for cross-skill proficiency reporting. [VI] Nhóm cấp độ đã chuẩn hóa (ví dụ: Beginner, Intermediate, Advanced...).  Dùng trường này để báo cáo trình độ chung.

level_progress_percentage.name: level_progress_percentage
level_progress_percentage.description: [EN] Progress percentage associated with this level (0-100). [VI] Phần trăm tiến độ tương ứng với level.

is_default_level.name: is_default_level
is_default_level.description: [EN] Indicates if this is the default level assigned when none is specified. [VI] Đánh dấu level mặc định.

is_selectable.name: is_selectable
is_selectable.description: [EN] Indicates if this level is currently available for selection. [VI] Level còn có thể chọn được hay không.

etl_datetime.name: etl_datetime
etl_datetime.description: [EN] ETL processing timestamp. For pipeline monitoring only. [VI] Thời điểm xử lý ETL. Chỉ dùng cho monitoring pipeline.

model.dwh_project.dim_skill_level.raw_code:
-- models/marts/hr/dim_skill_level.sql
{{ config(materialized='table') }}

SELECT
    skill_level_id,
    skill_type_id,
    level_name,
    CASE 
        -- Nhóm theo số thứ tự (Dành cho các loại Mức 1, 2, 3... hoặc 1. Beginner)
        WHEN level_name ~* '1|Beginner|Fresher|A1|N5|Topik 1|HSK 1' THEN 'Beginner / Level 1'
        WHEN level_name ~* '2|Elementary|Junior|A2|N4|Topik 2|HSK 2' THEN 'Elementary / Level 2'
        WHEN level_name ~* '3|Intermediate|Middle|B1|N3|Topik 3|HSK 3' THEN 'Intermediate / Level 3'
        WHEN level_name ~* '4|Senior|Advanced|B2|N2|Topik 4|HSK 4|Upper' THEN 'Advanced / Level 4'
        WHEN level_name ~* '5|6|Expert|Master|Native|C1|C2|N1|Topik 5|Topik 6|HSK 5|HSK 6' THEN 'Expert / High Level'
        
        -- Case mới phát sinh sẽ rơi vào đây
        ELSE level_name
    END AS level_group,
    level_progress_percentage,
    is_default_level,
    is_selectable,
    etl_datetime
FROM {{ ref('odoo_hr_skill_level') }}

model.dwh_project.dim_members_scd.name: dim_members_scd
model.dwh_project.dim_members_scd.raw_code:
{{ config(materialized='table') }}



WITH 

priority_status AS (
    SELECT 
        u.*,
        MIN(dbt_updated_at) OVER (PARTITION BY company_email) as min_dbt_updated_at
    FROM {{ ref('members_snapshot') }} u
    where staff_code is not null
 ),
create_date_used AS (
    SELECT 
        *,
        CASE 
            WHEN dbt_valid_from > min_dbt_updated_at
            THEN dbt_valid_from
            ELSE create_time
        END AS create_date_root
    FROM priority_status
),

get_end_date AS (
    SELECT 
        a.*,
        -- SẮP XẾP: Các bản ghi sort_priority=0 (Inactive) được xếp trước theo thời gian, 
        -- Bản ghi sort_priority=1 (Active) được đẩy xuống cuối.
        CASE 
            WHEN LEAD(create_date_root, 1, TIMESTAMP '2999-12-31') OVER (
                PARTITION BY company_email
                ORDER BY  create_date_root ASC , dbt_valid_from ASC
            ) = TIMESTAMP '2999-12-31' 
            THEN DATE '2999-12-31'
            ELSE (DATE_TRUNC('month', 
                LEAD(create_date_root, 1, TIMESTAMP '2999-12-31') OVER (
                    PARTITION BY company_email
                    ORDER BY  create_date_root ASC ,dbt_valid_from ASC
                )
            ) - INTERVAL '1 day')::DATE
        END AS end_date_1

    FROM create_date_used a

),
--  dùng cho case 1 email có 2 người dùng
remove_data_with_date AS (
    SELECT
        *
    FROM get_end_date
    WHERE 
        date(create_date_root) < end_date_1

),
cleaned_data AS (
    SELECT
        *
    FROM remove_data_with_date
    WHERE 
        NOT (user_status = 'Inactivity' and dbt_updated_at > min_dbt_updated_at)

),

-- user sẽ có ngày tạo và kết thúc , nhưng trạng thái inactive vẫn cần chỉnh lại để biết nghỉ thời gian nào
cleaned_users as (
    select *,
    date(DATE_TRUNC('month', create_date_root)) as create_date_used
    from cleaned_data
),

user_log AS (
    SELECT 
        u.lower_user_name as email,
        max(DATE_TRUNC('month',w.start_time)::DATE) as date
    FROM {{ ref('jira_worklog') }} w
    LEFT JOIN {{ ref('jira_app_user') }} u
    on w.worklog_author = u.user_key
    LEFT JOIN {{ ref('users') }} du
    on u.lower_user_name = du.company_email
    where du.user_status IN ('Inactivity', 'null')
    group by u.lower_user_name
),
user_jira_issues AS (
    SELECT 
        i.assignee_email as email,
        max(DATE_TRUNC('month',i.created_time)::DATE) as date
    FROM {{ ref('fct_jira_issues') }} i
    LEFT JOIN {{ ref('users') }} du
    on i.assignee_email = du.company_email
    where (du.user_status IN ('Inactivity', 'null') or du.user_status is null)
    group by i.assignee_email

),
user_pod AS (
    SELECT 
        u.company_email as email,
        max((p.month_year || '-01')::DATE) AS date
    FROM {{ ref('billable_efforts_approveds') }} p
    LEFT JOIN {{ ref('users') }} u
    on p.user_id = u.user_id
    where (u.user_status IN ('Inactivity', 'null') or u.user_status IS NULL)
    and effort != 0
    and p."is_deleted" = 'No'
    group by u.company_email
),
all_data_log as (
    select * from user_log
    union
    select * from user_pod
    union
    select * from user_jira_issues
),
-- lấy ngày cuối cùng user có ghi nhận trong hệ thống , chỉ lấy user inactive, null
max_date_user as (
    select 
        email,
        max(date) as max_date
    from all_data_log
    group by email
),

change_end_date_inactive_user as (
    select 
        cu.*,
        case 
           when (mu.max_date is NULL)
                AND (cu.user_status IN ('Inactivity', 'null') or cu.user_status IS NULL)
                then (date_trunc('month', cu.create_time) + interval '1 month - 1 day')::DATE
           when (mu.max_date is NOT NULL)
                AND (cu.user_status IN ('Inactivity', 'null') or cu.user_status IS NULL)
                then (date_trunc('month', mu.max_date) + interval '1 month - 1 day')::DATE

        end as end_date_2
    from cleaned_users cu
    left join max_date_user mu
    on cu.company_email = mu.email
),
_final as (
    select 
        *,
        CASE 
        WHEN (end_date_1 < end_date_2 ) OR (end_date_2 IS NULL)
            THEN end_date_1
        ELSE end_date_2
        END as end_date
    from change_end_date_inactive_user
)

SELECT
    a.user_id as member_id,
    a.user_name as member_name,
    a.company_email as member_email,
    a.staff_code,
    b.branch_name,
    b.branch_code,
    c.department_name,
    d.position_name,
    a.user_level,
    a.user_status,
    date(a.create_time) as create_date,
    a.create_date_used,
    a.end_date,
    COUNT(*) OVER (
        PARTITION BY a.company_email
    ) AS count_email_duplicates,
    a.etl_datetime
FROM _final a
LEFT JOIN {{ ref('branches') }} b
ON a.branch_id = b.branch_id
LEFT JOIN {{ ref('departments') }} c
ON a.department_id = c.department_id
LEFT JOIN {{ ref('user_positions') }} d
ON a.position_id = d.position_id
WHERE a.company_email is not NULL AND a.company_email != 'null' AND a.company_email NOT LIKE 'Inactive%'
and a.staff_code is not NULL 
-- and a.user_status not IN ('Inactivity', 'null')

GROUP BY
    member_id,
    member_name,
    member_email,
    staff_code,
    b.branch_name,
    b.branch_code,
    c.department_name,
    d.position_name,
    a.user_level,
    a.user_status,
    date(a.create_time),
    a.create_date_used,
    a.end_date,
    a.etl_datetime

                then (date_trunc('month', cu.create_time) + interval '1 month - 1 day')::DATE
           when (mu.max_date is NOT NULL)
                AND (cu.user_status IN ('Inactivity', 'null') or cu.user_status IS NULL)
                then (date_trunc('month', mu.max_date) + interval '1 month - 1 day')::DATE

        end as end_date_2
    from cleaned_users cu
    left join max_date_user mu
    on cu.company_email = mu.email
),
_final as (
    select 
        *,
        CASE 
        WHEN (end_date_1 < end_date_2 ) OR (end_date_2 IS NULL)
            THEN end_date_1
        ELSE end_date_2
        END as end_date
    from change_end_date_inactive_user
)

SELECT
    a.user_id as member_id,
    a.user_name as member_name,
    a.company_email as member_email,
    a.staff_code,
    b.branch_name,
    b.branch_code,
    c.department_name,
    d.position_name,
    a.user_level,
    a.user_status,
    date(a.create_time) as create_date,
    a.create_date_used,
    a.end_date,
    COUNT(*) OVER (
        PARTITION BY a.company_email
    ) AS count_email_duplicates,
    a.etl_datetime
FROM _final a
LEFT JOIN "dwh"."intermediates"."branches" b
ON a.branch_id = b.branch_id
LEFT JOIN "dwh"."intermediates"."departments" c
ON a.department_id = c.department_id
LEFT JOIN "dwh"."intermediates"."user_positions" d
ON a.position_id = d.position_id
WHERE a.company_email is not NULL AND a.company_email != 'null' AND a.company_email NOT LIKE 'Inactive%'
and a.staff_code is not NULL 
-- and a.user_status not IN ('Inactivity', 'null')

GROUP BY
    member_id,
    member_name,
    member_email,
    staff_code,
    b.branch_name,
    b.branch_code,
    c.department_name,
    d.position_name,
    a.user_level,
    a.user_status,
    date(a.create_time),
    a.create_date_used,
    a.end_date,
    a.etl_datetime

model.dwh_project.dim_member_email_effec.name: dim_member_email_effective
model.dwh_project.dim_member_email_effec.raw_code:
{{ config(materialized='table') }}

WITH priority_status AS (
    SELECT 
        u.*,

        -- Active ưu tiên sau, inactive đóng trước
        CASE 
            WHEN u.user_status IS NOT NULL 
             AND u.user_status != '' 
             AND u.user_status NOT ILIKE '%Inac%' 
            THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END AS sort_priority

    FROM {{ ref('members_snapshot') }} u
    WHERE 
    NOT (user_status ILIKE '%Inac%' and u.dbt_updated_at > (SELECT MIN(dbt_updated_at) FROM {{ ref('members_snapshot') }}))
),

/* =====================================================
   1. TẠO TIMELINE EMAIL (KHÔNG OVERLAP)
===================================================== */
get_end_date AS (
    SELECT 
        a.*,

        CASE 
            WHEN LEAD(create_time, 1, TIMESTAMP '2999-12-31') OVER (
                PARTITION BY company_email
                ORDER BY sort_priority ASC, create_time ASC
            ) = TIMESTAMP '2999-12-31'
            THEN DATE '2999-12-31'
            ELSE (
                DATE_TRUNC(
                    'month',
                    LEAD(create_time, 1, TIMESTAMP '2999-12-31') OVER (
                        PARTITION BY company_email
                        ORDER BY sort_priority ASC, create_time ASC
                    )
                ) - INTERVAL '1 day'
            )::DATE
        END AS end_date_1

    FROM priority_status a
),

/* =====================================================
   2. LOẠI RECORD NGƯỢC THỜI GIAN
===================================================== */
cleaned_data AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM get_end_date
    WHERE DATE(create_time) < end_date_1
       OR end_date_1 = DATE '2999-12-31'
),

/* =====================================================
   3. CHUẨN HÓA CREATE DATE VỀ ĐẦU THÁNG
===================================================== */
cleaned_users AS (
    SELECT 
        *,
        DATE_TRUNC('month', create_time)::DATE AS create_date_used
    FROM cleaned_data
),

/* =====================================================
   4. LẤY ACTIVITY CUỐI CÙNG (WORKLOG + POD)
===================================================== */
user_log AS (
    SELECT 
        u.lower_user_name AS email,
        MAX(DATE_TRUNC('month', w.start_time)::DATE) AS date
    FROM {{ ref('jira_worklog') }} w
    JOIN {{ ref('jira_app_user') }} u
      ON w.worklog_author = u.user_key
    GROUP BY u.lower_user_name
),

user_pod AS (
    SELECT 
        u.company_email AS email,
        MAX((p.month_year || '-01')::DATE) AS date
    FROM {{ ref('billable_efforts_approveds') }} p
    JOIN {{ ref('users') }} u
      ON p.user_id = u.user_id
    WHERE p.effort != 0
      AND p.is_deleted = 'No'
    GROUP BY u.company_email
),

all_data_log AS (
    SELECT * FROM user_log
    UNION
    SELECT * FROM user_pod
),

max_date_user AS (
    SELECT 
        email,
        MAX(date) AS max_date
    FROM all_data_log
    GROUP BY email
),

/* =====================================================
   5. LOGIC INACTIVE THEO ĐÚNG CÁCH BẠN ĐANG DÙNG
===================================================== */
change_end_date_inactive_user AS (
    SELECT 
        cu.*,

        CASE 
            -- Inactive + không activity + không expired
            WHEN cu.expired_time IS NULL
             AND mu.max_date IS NULL
             AND cu.end_date_1 = DATE '2999-12-31'
             AND (cu.user_status ILIKE '%Inac%' OR cu.user_status IS NULL)
            THEN (DATE_TRUNC('month', cu.create_time) 
                  + INTERVAL '1 month - 1 day')::DATE

            -- Activity sau expired hoặc expired null → lấy activity
            WHEN (mu.max_date > DATE_TRUNC('month', cu.expired_time)::DATE 
                  OR cu.expired_time IS NULL)
             AND cu.end_date_1 = DATE '2999-12-31'
             AND (cu.user_status ILIKE '%Inac%' OR cu.user_status IS NULL)
            THEN (DATE_TRUNC('month', mu.max_date) 
                  + INTERVAL '1 month - 1 day')::DATE

            -- Activity trước expired → chặn theo expired
            WHEN (mu.max_date <= DATE_TRUNC('month', cu.expired_time)::DATE 
                  OR mu.max_date IS NULL)
             AND cu.end_date_1 = DATE '2999-12-31'
             AND (cu.user_status ILIKE '%Inac%' OR cu.user_status IS NULL)
            THEN (DATE_TRUNC('month', cu.expired_time) 
                  + INTERVAL '1 month - 1 day')::DATE
        END AS end_date_2

    FROM cleaned_users cu
    LEFT JOIN max_date_user mu
      ON cu.company_email = mu.email
),

/* =====================================================
   6. END DATE CUỐI (GIỮ LOGIC CỦA BẠN)
===================================================== */
_final AS (
    SELECT 
        *,
        COALESCE(end_date_2, end_date_1) AS end_date
    FROM change_end_date_inactive_user
)

SELECT
{#  {{ dbt_utils.generate_surrogate_key([
        'company_email',
        'create_date_used'
    ]) }} AS member_email_sk, #}
    user_id                         AS member_id,
    user_name                       AS member_name,
    company_email                   AS member_email,
    staff_code,
    branch_id,
    department_id,
    position_id,
    user_level,
    user_status,

    DATE(create_time)               AS create_date,
    create_date_used,
    end_date,

    COUNT(*) OVER (
        PARTITION BY company_email
    ) AS count_email_duplicates,
    etl_datetime

FROM _final
WHERE company_email IS NOT NULL
  AND company_email != 'null'
  AND company_email NOT LIKE 'Inactive%'

model.dwh_project.dim_odoo_members.name: dim_odoo_members

data_characteristics.dedup_note: Source may have duplicate member_code. Dedup logic already applied (latest is_active DESC + member_id DESC, member_code > 1000). Do not re-deduplicate in queries.

temporal_logic.active_employee: official_date <= CURRENT_DATE AND (end_date IS NULL OR end_date > CURRENT_DATE)
temporal_logic.point_in_time: official_date <= :target_date AND (end_date IS NULL OR end_date > :target_date)

avoid_for: determining active status via member_status alone
exact job title filtering (use position_name, not position_group)
warnings: Never use member_status alone to filter active employees
Always use official_date + end_date pair for point-in-time queries
end_date IS NULL means currently employed
position_group is derived from job_title using pattern matching — may misclassify edge cases
member_status_detail is derived using business logic from date fields
official_date uses fallback logic across multiple date fields

model.dwh_project.dim_odoo_members.description:
[EN] Core employee dimension table enriched with contract, position, and organizational information. Each row represents one employee after deduplication and latest record selection. Includes derived fields for reporting such as position group and employment status.
[VI] Bảng nhân viên chính đã được enrich với thông tin hợp đồng, chức danh và tổ chức. Mỗi dòng là 1 nhân viên sau khi xử lý loại bỏ trùng và lấy bản ghi mới nhất. Bao gồm các trường phân loại phục vụ báo cáo như nhóm chức danh và trạng thái làm việc.

member_id.name: member_id
member_id.description: [EN] Unique identifier of employee. [VI] Mã định danh nhân viên.

member_name.name: member_name
member_name.description: [EN] Full name of employee. [VI] Tên nhân viên.

member_email.name: member_email
member_email.description: [EN] Work email of employee. [VI] Email công việc của nhân viên.

member_code.name: member_code
member_code.description: [EN] Business identifier of employee (from source system). [VI] Mã nhân viên từ hệ thống nguồn.

member_type.name: member_type
member_type.description: [EN] Type of employee. [VI] Loại nhân viên.

marital.name: marital
marital.description: [EN] Marital status. [VI] Tình trạng hôn nhân.

job_id.name: job_id
job_id.description: [EN] Position identifier. Foreign key to dim_odoo_job. [VI] Mã chức danh. Khóa ngoại tới dim_odoo_job.

position_name.name: position_name
position_name.description: [EN] Raw job title from source system . [VI] Chức danh gốc từ hệ thống nguồn.

position_group.name: position_group
position_group.description: [EN] Derived grouping of position based on job_title pattern matching. Values: ENGINEERING, SALES, MARKETING, HR_ADMIN, MANAGEMENT, PRODUCT_BA, OPERATION, INTERN_CTV, OTHER. Do not use for exact job title filtering — use position_name instead. [VI] Nhóm chức danh được phân loại từ job_title. Không dùng để filter chức danh chính xác.

group_role_name.name: group_role_name
group_role_name.description: [EN] Higher-level role grouping. Defaults to 'Khác' if unknown. [VI] Nhóm vai trò cấp cao hơn. Mặc định là 'Khác' nếu không xác định.

branch_root_name.name: branch_root_name
branch_root_name.description: [EN] Root branch name. [VI] Tên chi nhánh gốc.

branch_root_code.name: branch_root_code
branch_root_code.description: [EN] Root branch code. [VI] Mã chi nhánh gốc.

branch_name.name: branch_name
branch_name.description: [EN] Branch group name. Use this for branch-level reporting. [VI] Tên nhóm chi nhánh. Dùng cái này cho báo cáo theo chi nhánh.

branch_code.name: branch_code
branch_code.description: [EN] Branch group code. [VI] Mã nhóm chi nhánh.

member_level.name: member_level
member_level.description: [EN] Employee level. Defaults to FRESHER if not set. [VI] Cấp bậc nhân viên. Mặc định là FRESHER nếu không có.

member_status.name: member_status
member_status.description: [EN] Raw employment status from source system. WARNING: Do not use alone to determine if employee is active. Use official_date + end_date pair instead for point-in-time queries. [VI] Trạng thái gốc từ hệ thống. KHÔNG dùng để xác định nhân viên đang làm — dùng official_date + end_date.

member_status_root.name: member_status_root
member_status_root.description: [EN] Root-level employment status. [VI] Trạng thái cấp cao.

member_status_detail.name: member_status_detail
member_status_detail.description: [EN] Derived detailed employment status. Values: Official, Probationary, Apprentice, or contract type. Derived from date fields in this order: start_working_date → probation_start_date → traineeship_start_date → contract_type. Preferred field for employment status reporting over member_status. [VI] Trạng thái chi tiết được suy ra từ các trường ngày. Ưu tiên dùng cái này thay vì member_status.

contract_type.name: contract_type
contract_type.description: [EN] Latest contract type from most recent contract record. [VI] Loại hợp đồng mới nhất.

age_at_hire.name: age_at_hire
age_at_hire.description: [EN] Age at joining date, computed as joining_date year minus birthday year. [VI] Tuổi khi vào làm, tính từ năm joining_date trừ năm sinh.

official_date.name: official_date
official_date.description: [EN] Primary employment start date for point-in-time analysis. Fallback order: start_working_date → probation_start_date → traineeship_start_date → joining_date → departure_date → resign_date. Always pair with end_date to determine active status at any target date. Use this as the primary date field for tenure calculations. [VI] Ngày bắt đầu làm chính. Thứ tự fallback như trên. Luôn kết hợp với end_date để xác định trạng thái tại thời điểm bất kỳ. Dùng cột này để tính thâm niên.

end_date.name: end_date
end_date.description: [EN] Employment end date. NULL means the employee is currently active. Use with official_date for point-in-time headcount queries. Pattern: official_date <= :target_date AND (end_date IS NULL OR end_date > :target_date) [VI] Ngày nghỉ việc. NULL = đang làm việc. Kết hợp với official_date để query headcount tại thời điểm bất kỳ.

joining_date.name: joining_date
joining_date.description: [EN] Initial joining date (first day at company). [VI] Ngày vào công ty lần đầu.

start_working_date.name: start_working_date
start_working_date.description: [EN] Official working start date (after probation/traineeship). [VI] Ngày bắt đầu làm chính thức (sau thử việc/học việc).

probation_date.name: probation_date
probation_date.description: [EN] Probation period start date. [VI] Ngày bắt đầu thử việc.

traineeship_date.name: traineeship_date
traineeship_date.description: [EN] Traineeship/apprentice start date. [VI] Ngày bắt đầu học việc.

departure_date.name: departure_date
departure_date.description: [EN] Departure date from position (may differ from resign_date). [VI] Ngày rời vị trí (có thể khác resign_date).

resign_date.name: resign_date
resign_date.description: [EN] Official resignation date. [VI] Ngày nghỉ việc chính thức.

etl_datetime.name: etl_datetime
etl_datetime.description: [EN] ETL processing timestamp. For pipeline monitoring only. [VI] Thời điểm xử lý ETL. Chỉ dùng cho monitoring pipeline.

data_characteristics.dedup_note: Source may have duplicate member_code. Dedup logic already applied (latest is_active DESC + member_id DESC, member_code > 1000). Do not re-deduplicate in queries.

model.dwh_project.dim_odoo_members.raw_code:
{{ config(materialized='table') }}

with 
-- lấy hợp đồng mới nhất của mỗi nhân viên để biết được loại hợp đồng hiện tại của họ
contracts as (
    select 
        member_code,
        row_number() over (partition by member_code order by date_start desc) as rn,
        contract_type
    from {{ ref('odoo_hr_contract') }}
),
latest_contracts as (
    select 
        member_code,
        contract_type
    from contracts
    where rn = 1
),
member_ranking as (
    select 
        *,
        row_number() over (
            partition by member_code 
            order by 
                is_active desc, 
                member_id desc
        ) as member_rn
    from {{ ref('odoo_hr_member') }}
    where member_code > 1000
),

filtered_members as (
    select *
    from member_ranking
    where member_rn = 1
)

SELECT 
    e.member_id,
    e.name as member_name,
    e.work_email as member_email,
    e.member_code as member_code,
    e.member_type,
    e.gender,
    e.marital,
    e.job_id,
    initcap(
        lower(
            COALESCE(e.level, 'FRESHER')
            )
    ) as member_level,
    b.branch_name as branch_root_name,
    b.branch_code as branch_root_code,
    b.branch_group_name as branch_name,
    b.branch_group_code as branch_code,
    d.division_name,
    d.division_group,
    COALESCE(e.job_title, 'Unknown') AS position_name,
    CASE 
        -- INTERN / CTV
        WHEN e.job_title ILIKE '%intern%' 
        OR e.job_title ILIKE '%thử việc%' 
        OR e.job_title ILIKE '%học việc%' 
        OR e.job_title ILIKE '%cộng tác viên%' 
        OR e.job_title ILIKE '%CTV%' 
        THEN 'INTERN_CTV'

        -- MANAGEMENT
        WHEN e.job_title ILIKE '%manager%' 
        OR e.job_title ILIKE '%director%' 
        OR e.job_title ILIKE '%leader%' 
        OR e.job_title ILIKE '%head%' 
        OR e.job_title ILIKE '%ceo%' 
        OR e.job_title ILIKE '%cto%' 
        THEN 'MANAGEMENT'

        -- ENGINEERING
        WHEN e.job_title ILIKE '%developer%' 
        OR e.job_title ILIKE '%engineer%' 
        OR e.job_title ILIKE '%ai%' 
        OR e.job_title ILIKE '%data%' 
        OR e.job_title ILIKE '%tester%' 
        OR e.job_title ILIKE '%qa%' 
        OR e.job_title ILIKE '%devops%' 
        OR e.job_title ILIKE '%cloud%' 
        THEN 'ENGINEERING'

        -- PRODUCT / BA
        WHEN e.job_title ILIKE '%ba%' 
        OR e.job_title ILIKE '%business analyst%' 
        OR e.job_title ILIKE '%product%' 
        THEN 'PRODUCT_BA'

        -- SALES
        WHEN e.job_title ILIKE '%sale%' 
        OR e.job_title ILIKE '%account%' 
        OR e.job_title ILIKE '%business development%' 
        THEN 'SALES'

        -- MARKETING
        WHEN e.job_title ILIKE '%marketing%' 
        OR e.job_title ILIKE '%mkt%' 
        OR e.job_title ILIKE '%content%' 
        THEN 'MARKETING'

        -- HR / ADMIN
        WHEN e.job_title ILIKE '%hr%' 
        OR e.job_title ILIKE '%admin%' 
        OR e.job_title ILIKE '%accountant%' 
        OR e.job_title ILIKE '%legal%' 
        THEN 'HR_ADMIN'

        -- OPERATION
        WHEN e.job_title ILIKE '%project%' 
        OR e.job_title ILIKE '%delivery%' 
        OR e.job_title ILIKE '%support%' 
        OR e.job_title ILIKE '%operation%' 
        THEN 'OPERATION'

        ELSE 'OTHER'

        END as position_group,
    INITCAP(
        LOWER(
            CASE 
                WHEN j.group_role_name IS NULL OR LOWER(j.group_role_name) = 'unknown' THEN 'Khác'
                ELSE j.group_role_name 
            END
        )
    ) AS group_role_name,
    -- COALESCE(j.group_role_name, 'Unknown') AS group_role_name,
    e.state as member_status,
    e.state_root as member_status_root,
    lc.contract_type,
    initcap(lower(
        CASE 
            -- WHEN b.branch_group_code = 'Onsite' THEN 'Onsite'
             -- Trả về giá trị cột, không để trong nháy đơn
            WHEN e.start_working_date is not NULL THEN 'Official' 
            WHEN e.probation_start_date is not NULL THEN 'Probationary' 
            WHEN e.traineeship_start_date is not NULL THEN 'Apprentice'
            WHEN lc.contract_type IS NOT NULL THEN lc.contract_type
            ELSE 'Unknown'
        END
    )) AS member_status_detail,
    COALESCE(
            EXTRACT(YEAR FROM e.joining_date)
            - EXTRACT(YEAR FROM e.birthday),
            0
    )::INT                                              
    AS age_at_hire,

    -- học vấn
    -- e.rank_id,
    -- e.academic_level_id,
    -- e.qualification_id,

    -- date
    e.issue_date_identification,
    e.birthday,
    e.joining_date,
    e.start_working_date,
    coalesce(e.start_working_date,e.probation_start_date,e.traineeship_start_date, e.joining_date, e.departure_date ,e.resign_date) as official_date,
    e.probation_start_date as probation_date,
    e.traineeship_start_date as traineeship_date,
    e.departure_date as departure_date,
    e.resign_date as resign_date,
    coalesce(e.resign_date) as end_date,
    e.etl_datetime


FROM filtered_members e
LEFT JOIN latest_contracts lc
    ON cast(e.member_code AS INTEGER) = cast(lc.member_code AS INTEGER)
left join {{ ref('dim_odoo_branch') }} b
    on e.company_id = b.id
left join {{ ref('dim_odoo_division') }} d
    on e.division_id = d.id
left join {{ ref('dim_odoo_job') }} j
    on e.job_id = j.job_id

with 
-- lấy hợp đồng mới nhất của mỗi nhân viên để biết được loại hợp đồng hiện tại của họ
contracts as (
    select 
        member_code,
        row_number() over (partition by member_code order by date_start desc) as rn,
        contract_type
    from "dwh"."intermediates"."odoo_hr_contract"
),
latest_contracts as (
    select 
        member_code,
        contract_type
    from contracts
    where rn = 1
),
member_ranking as (
    select 
        *,
        row_number() over (
            partition by member_code 
            order by 
                is_active desc, 
                member_id desc
        ) as member_rn
    from "dwh"."intermediates"."odoo_hr_member"
    where member_code > 1000
),

filtered_members as (
    select *
    from member_ranking
    where member_rn = 1
)

        WHEN e.job_title ILIKE '%sale%'

        -- HR / ADMIN

        OR e.job_title ILIKE '%admin%' 
        OR e.job_title ILIKE '%accountant%' 
        OR e.job_title ILIKE '%legal%'

        -- OPERATION

        OR e.job_title ILIKE '%support%' 
        OR e.job_title ILIKE '%operation%' 
        THEN 'OPERATION'

        ELSE 'OTHER'

        END as position_group,
    INITCAP(
        LOWER(
            CASE 
                WHEN j.group_role_name IS NULL OR LOWER(j.group_role_name) = 'unknown' THEN 'Khác'
                ELSE j.group_role_name 
            END
        )
    ) AS group_role_name,
    -- COALESCE(j.group_role_name, 'Unknown') AS group_role_name,

            -- WHEN b.branch_group_code = 'Onsite' THEN 'Onsite'
             -- Trả về giá trị cột, không để trong nháy đơn
            WHEN e.start_working_date is not NULL THEN 'Official' 
            WHEN e.probation_start_date is not NULL THEN 'Probationary'

    COALESCE(
            EXTRACT(YEAR FROM e.joining_date)
            - EXTRACT(YEAR FROM e.birthday),
            0
    )::INT                                              
    AS age_at_hire,

    -- học vấn

model.dwh_project.dim_member_education.name: dim_member_education
model.dwh_project.dim_member_education.raw_code:
{{ config(materialized='table') }}

WITH education AS (
    SELECT * FROM {{ ref('odoo_hr_member_education') }}
),

schools AS (
    SELECT * FROM {{ ref('odoo_hr_member_school') }}
),

academic_levels AS (
    SELECT * FROM {{ ref('odoo_z_academic_level') }}
),

qualifications AS (
    SELECT * FROM {{ ref('odoo_z_qualification') }}
),

grad_ranks AS (
    SELECT * FROM {{ ref('odoo_hr_graduation_rank') }}
)

SELECT
    ed.education_id,
    ed.member_id,
    -- Thông tin trường học
    s.school_name,
    s.school_type,
    
    -- Trình độ & Bằng cấp
    al.level_name AS academic_level,
    q.qualification_name AS degree_name,
    CASE
        -- =========================
        -- 1. LANGUAGE (ưu tiên)
        -- =========================
        WHEN LOWER(q.qualification_name) ~ 
        '(ngôn ngữ|tiếng nhật|tiếng anh|tiếng hàn|tiếng trung'
        '|japanese|日本語|korean|chinese|english'
        '|nhật bản học|hàn quốc học|biên.*phiên dịch|phương đông học'
        '|(it|cntt|công nghệ thông tin).*nhật)'
            THEN 'Language'

        -- =========================
        -- 2. TECH - SOFTWARE (MỞ RỘNG)
        -- =========================
        WHEN LOWER(q.qualification_name) ~ 
        '(software|software engineer|kỹ sư phần mềm|kỹ thuật phần mềm|công nghệ phần mềm'
        '|computer science|computer science and engineering|khoa học máy tính'
        '|lập trình|programming|developer|dev\b'
        '|web|frontend|backend|fullstack|mobile'
        '|it-web)'
            THEN 'Tech - Software'

        -- =========================
        -- 3. TECH - DATA / INFRA / QA
        -- =========================
        WHEN LOWER(q.qualification_name) ~ 
        '(data|ai|machine learning|deep learning|nlp|khoa học dữ liệu|phân tích dữ liệu'
        '|network|mạng|an ninh|security|devops|cloud'
        '|qa\b|qc\b|tester|kiểm thử)'
            THEN 'Tech - Data/Infra/QA'

        -- =========================
        -- 4. TECH - GENERAL IT (CỰC QUAN TRỌNG)
        -- =========================
        WHEN LOWER(q.qualification_name) ~ 
        '(công nghệ thông tin|information technology|\bit\b|cntt)'
            THEN 'Tech - Software'

        -- =========================
        -- 5. BUSINESS / FINANCE
        -- =========================
        WHEN LOWER(q.qualification_name) ~ 
        '(kinh tế|business|tài chính|finance|ngân hàng|banking|kế toán|accounting|kiểm toán)'
            THEN 'Business / Finance'

        -- =========================
        -- 6. MARKETING / DESIGN
        -- =========================
        WHEN LOWER(q.qualification_name) ~ 
        '(marketing|truyền thông|design|thiết kế|đồ họa|ui|ux)'
            THEN 'Marketing / Design'

        ELSE 'Others'
    END AS degree_group,
    ed.faculty AS major, -- Chuyên ngành
    ed.graduation_year,
    
    -- Xếp loại tốt nghiệp
    gr.graduation_rank_name AS graduation_rating,
    CASE 

        -- Xuất sắc
        WHEN gr.graduation_rank_name ILIKE '%xuất sắc%' 
        OR gr.graduation_rank_name ~* 'gpa\s*[3]\.[8-9]' 
        THEN 'Xuất sắc'

        -- Giỏi
        WHEN gr.graduation_rank_name ILIKE '%giỏi%' 
        AND gr.graduation_rank_name NOT ILIKE '%khá%' 
        THEN 'Giỏi'

        -- Khá (bao gồm trung bình khá, khá - giỏi)
        WHEN gr.graduation_rank_name ILIKE '%khá%' 
        THEN 'Khá'

        -- Trung bình
        WHEN gr.graduation_rank_name ILIKE '%trung bình%' 
        THEN 'Trung bình'

        -- Chưa tốt
        WHEN gr.graduation_rank_name ILIKE '%chưa%' 
        THEN 'Chưa TN'

        -- Không rõ
        WHEN gr.graduation_rank_name ILIKE '%unknown%' 
        OR gr.graduation_rank_name ILIKE '%khác%' 
        THEN 'Unknown'

        ELSE gr.graduation_rank_name

        END as graduation_rating_group,
    
    -- Audit info
    ed.create_date AS record_created_at,
    ed.etl_datetime AS etl_datetime
FROM education ed
LEFT JOIN schools s ON ed.study_school_id = s.school_id
LEFT JOIN academic_levels al ON ed.academic_level_id = al.academic_level_id
LEFT JOIN qualifications q ON ed.qualification_id = q.qualification_id
LEFT JOIN grad_ranks gr ON ed.rank_id = gr.graduation_rank_id

model.dwh_project.fct_jira_issues.name: fct_jira_issues

avoid_for: direct time aggregation without understanding units
employee-level counting without grouping
warnings: time fields are in seconds (divide by 3600 for hours)
this is issue-level data, not individual worklogs
assignee_email may fallback to reporter if no one is assigned
resolution_date can be null for open issues

model.dwh_project.fct_jira_issues.description:
[EN] Fact table containing Jira issues with enriched metadata such as assignee, status, priority, and time tracking. Each row represents one issue. This table is used for issue tracking, workload analysis, and project monitoring.
[VI] Bảng fact chứa thông tin các issue trong Jira, bao gồm assignee, trạng thái, độ ưu tiên và thời gian. Mỗi dòng là 1 issue. Dùng để phân tích công việc và theo dõi tiến độ.

issue_id.name: issue_id
issue_id.description: [EN] Unique identifier of issue. [VI] Mã định danh issue.

assignee_email.name: assignee_email
assignee_email.description: [EN] Email of assigned user (fallback to reporter if null). [VI] Email người được giao việc (fallback về reporter nếu null).

issue_number.name: issue_number
issue_number.description: [EN] Issue key/number (e.g. ABC-123). [VI] Mã issue hiển thị.

jira_project_id.name: jira_project_id
jira_project_id.description: [EN] Project identifier. Foreign key to dim_projects. [VI] Mã project. Khóa ngoại tới dim_projects.

reporter_email.name: reporter_email
reporter_email.description: [EN] Email of reporter. [VI] Email người tạo issue.

issue_creator.name: issue_creator
issue_creator.description: [EN] Creator of issue. [VI] Người tạo issue.

issue_reporter.name: issue_reporter
issue_reporter.description: [EN] Reporter user key. [VI] User key người báo cáo.

issue_assignee.name: issue_assignee
issue_assignee.description: [EN] Assignee user key. [VI] User key người được giao.

issue_description.name: issue_description
issue_description.description: [EN] Detailed description. [VI] Mô tả chi tiết.

priority.name: priority
priority.description: [EN] Priority level (e.g. High, Medium). [VI] Mức độ ưu tiên.

type_id.name: type_id
type_id.description: [EN] Issue type identifier. [VI] Mã loại issue.

type.name: type
type.description: [EN] Issue type name (bug, task, story). [VI] Loại issue.

resolution.name: resolution
resolution.description: [EN] Resolution result. [VI] Kết quả xử lý.

resolution_date.name: resolution_date
resolution_date.description: [EN] Date when issue was resolved. [VI] Ngày hoàn thành.

status.name: status
status.description: [EN] Current status of issue. [VI] Trạng thái hiện tại.

due_date.name: due_date
due_date.description: [EN] Due date of issue. [VI] Hạn deadline.

time_original_estimate.name: time_original_estimate
time_original_estimate.description: [EN] Original time estimate (seconds). [VI] Thời gian ước tính ban đầu (giây).

time_estimate.name: time_estimate
time_estimate.description: [EN] Remaining estimate time (seconds). [VI] Thời gian ước tính còn lại (giây).

time_spent.name: time_spent
time_spent.description: [EN] Actual time spent (seconds). [VI] Thời gian đã làm (giây).

created_time.name: created_time
created_time.description: [EN] Issue creation timestamp. [VI] Thời điểm tạo issue.

updated_time.name: updated_time
updated_time.description: [EN] Last updated timestamp. [VI] Thời điểm cập nhật.

etl_datetime.name: etl_datetime
etl_datetime.description: [EN] ETL processing timestamp. For pipeline monitoring only. [VI] Thời điểm ETL. Chỉ dùng cho monitoring pipeline.

avoid_for: direct time aggregation without understanding units
employee-level counting without grouping
warnings: time fields are in seconds (divide by 3600 for hours)
this is issue-level data, not individual worklogs
assignee_email may fallback to reporter if no one is assigned
resolution_date can be null for open issues

model.dwh_project.fct_jira_issues.raw_code:
{{ config(materialized='table') }}

with issue_data as (
    select iss.*,
    COALESCE(u_ass.lower_user_name, iss.issue_assignee) as assignee_email,
    COALESCE(u_rep.lower_user_name, iss.issue_reporter) as reporter_email
    from {{ ref('jira_issues') }} iss
        left join {{ ref('jira_app_user') }} u_ass
        on iss.issue_assignee = u_ass.user_key
        left join {{ ref('jira_app_user') }} u_rep
        on iss.issue_reporter = u_rep.user_key
)

SELECT
    a.issue_id,
    COALESCE(a.assignee_email, a.reporter_email) AS assignee_email,
    a.issue_number,
    a.jira_project_id,
    a.reporter_email as reporter_email,
    a.issue_creator,
    a.issue_reporter,
    a.issue_assignee,
    a.issue_summary,
    a.issue_description,
    e.priority_name as priority,
    a.issue_type as type_id,
    b.type_name as type,
    c.resolution_name as resolution,
    a.resolution_date,
    d.status_name as status,
    a.due_date,
    a.time_original_estimate,
    a.time_estimate,	  
    a.time_spent,
    a.created_time,
    a.updated_time,
    a.etl_datetime
FROM issue_data a
LEFT JOIN {{ ref('jira_issue_types') }} b
ON a.issue_type = b.type_id
LEFT JOIN {{ ref('jira_issue_resolution') }} c
ON a.issue_resolution = c.resolution_id
LEFT JOIN {{ ref('jira_issue_status') }} d      
ON a.issue_status = d.status_id
LEFT JOIN {{ ref('jira_issue_priority') }} e
ON a.issue_priority = e.priority_id

model.dwh_project.fct_member_skill.name: fct_member_skill

avoid_for: time-based historical analysis (table only reflects current skills)
direct aggregation without grouping by member or skill
warnings: One employee can have multiple skills → avoid counting rows as unique employees
ALWAYS use COUNT(DISTINCT member_id) for employee-level metrics
This table does not track historical changes of skill levels over time
level_group and progress are often snapshots of the current state

model.dwh_project.fct_member_skill.description:
[EN] Fact table linking employees to their skills and skill levels. Each row represents one employee with one skill and its corresponding level. This table is used as a bridge between employee and skill dimensions.
[VI] Bảng fact liên kết nhân viên với kỹ năng và trình độ kỹ năng. Mỗi dòng là 1 nhân viên với 1 kỹ năng và level tương ứng. Bảng này dùng làm cầu nối giữa nhân viên và kỹ năng.

member_skill_id.name: member_skill_id
member_skill_id.description: [EN] Unique identifier of employee-skill record. [VI] Mã định danh của bản ghi nhân viên - kỹ năng.

member_id.name: member_id
member_id.description: [EN] Employee identifier. Foreign key to dim_employee. [VI] Mã nhân viên. Khóa ngoại tới dim_employee.

skill_id.name: skill_id
skill_id.description: [EN] Skill identifier. Foreign key to dim_odoo_skill. [VI] Mã kỹ năng. Khóa ngoại tới dim_odoo_skill.

skill_level_id.name: skill_level_id
skill_level_id.description: [EN] Skill level identifier. Foreign key to dim_skill_level. [VI] Mã cấp độ kỹ năng. Khóa ngoại tới dim_skill_level.

level_name.name: level_name
level_name.description: [EN] Name of skill level. [VI] Tên cấp độ kỹ năng.

level_group.name: level_group
level_group.description: [EN] Group of skill level (e.g., Beginner, Intermediate). [VI] Nhóm cấp độ kỹ năng.

level_progress_percentage.name: level_progress_percentage
level_progress_percentage.description: [EN] Progress percentage of skill level (0-100). [VI] Phần trăm tiến độ của kỹ năng.

created_at.name: created_at
created_at.description: [EN] Record creation timestamp in source system. [VI] Thời điểm tạo bản ghi.

updated_at.name: updated_at
updated_at.description: [EN] Last update timestamp in source system. [VI] Thời điểm cập nhật.

etl_datetime.name: etl_datetime
etl_datetime.description: [EN] ETL processing timestamp. For pipeline monitoring only. [VI] Thời điểm xử lý ETL. Chỉ dùng cho monitoring pipeline.

model.dwh_project.fct_member_skill.raw_code:
-- models/marts/hr/fct_member_skill.sql
{{ config(materialized='table') }}

WITH member_skill AS (
    SELECT * FROM {{ ref('odoo_hr_member_skill') }}
),

skill_level AS (
    SELECT * FROM {{ ref('dim_skill_level') }}
)

SELECT
    es.member_skill_id,
    es.member_id,      -- Đây là ID để bạn join với bảng Employee/User
    es.skill_id,         -- Join với dim_skill
    es.skill_level_id,   -- Join với dim_skill_level
    
    -- Denormalize một vài trường quan trọng để BI query nhanh hơn
    sl.level_name,
    sl.level_group,
    sl.level_progress_percentage,
    
    -- Audit
    es.created_at,
    es.updated_at,
    es.etl_datetime
FROM member_skill es
LEFT JOIN skill_level sl ON es.skill_level_id = sl.skill_level_id
